title: Burnt Tomato Salsa
summary: A fresh and vibrant salsa that's perfect for the summer. It'll give you a bit of an arm workout but it's so, so worth it.

method.description: Preheat your grill to the highest setting.

Cover all your veg in olive oil on a baking tray before popping them under the grill for 15-20 mins until very charred (every grill is different, so keep an eye on them every couple of minutes). Another option is to char them using a blowtorch or the flame of the hob instead, but make sure to be very careful if doing so.

Roughly chop the charred veg and place the garlic, red chillies, 1 tsp flaky sea salt into a mortar and pestle. Bash them together to form a fine paste. After you've made this chilli and garlic paste, add in the peppers and tomatoes and continue bashing until you form a chunky salsa. This could take up to 10 mins.
Serve with some tortilla chips and enjoy.

chefs.name: Seema Pankhania
chefs.summary: Seema Pankhania (aka @seemagetsbaked) is a superstar food creator, with over 1.2M followers and 21.8M Likes on TikTok. After training at Gordon Ramsay's Lucky Cat restaurant, Seema embarked on a presenting career at Mob, where she was responsible for many of their most popular recipes.
